death.attack.black_flash.item: %s was destroyed by %s's black flash using %s
death.attack.false_life.player: %s ran out of borrowed time whilst fighting %s
death.attack.ice_spike: %s was skewered by an ice spike
death.attack.ice_spike.player: %s was skewered by an ice spike whilst fighting %s
death.attack.starfall_explosion.player: %s was crushed by a meteorite whilst fighting %s
death.attack.snare.player: %s didn't watch their step whilst fighting %s
perk_description.anima_bargain: Gain max health equal to the difference between your base perk cost limit and your used perk cost.
perk_description.apprentice: Spawn with a random Alchemist potion. You learn the recipes for Alchemist potions.
perk_description.blood_pin: Spawn with Blood Pin; On use take 1 damage. When you take damage gain a blood stack (max 4), after going 3s without taking damage lose all blood stacks. For each blood stack you gain +2.5 knockback resistance.
perk_description.bullet_time: Using your ranged weapon mid-air causes your decent to slow to a halt for up to 3s or until you sneak
perk_description.cheese_presser: Spawn with +2 cheese. When you kill a mob, gain 2 cheese.
perk_description.cheese_ultima: Replaces your cheese with Cheese Ultima, which isn't consumed when eaten and has a cooldown.
perk_description.chipped_shoulder: When you are eliminated (Once), revive at the point you died and gain strength and saturation for 60s; After 60s you die. Upon sudden death gain strength and saturation for 60s.
perk_description.closing_act: Upon sudden death, you gain 8 tricks and every other player gains 2 tricks.
perk_description.compact_engines: You have +1 perk cost limit and -5%% sprint speed for each other equipped Engine perk.
perk_description.crumbling_heretic: When you kill a player lose 1 life then gain 1 crumbling stack. For each crumbling stack, you gain +2 max health, +0.2 attack damage, +0.4 mining speed, and +0.002 movement speed.
perk_description.dark_twilight: Upon sudden death, spawns a wither at your location. If you are eliminated, instead spawns it at the location of a random alive player.
perk_description.devotee: When you die, your enemy killer gains slowness 2 and mining fatigue 2 for 6s; Allies within 8m gain regeneration 2 and resistance for 6s
perk_description.executioners_mark: Every 6 player kills, gain an Executioner's Mark (50 damage, 1 durability).
perk_description.freshweaver: Makes your kicks fresh if you are Fleshweaver.
perk_description.game_afoot: While you are 8+ metres away from the last player you hit, you have +40%% movement speed. This effect wears off when the last hit player dies or is 32+ metres away.
perk_description.gourmet: Replaces your cheese with Gourmet Stew, a heartier meal that grants regeneration and haste. You learn the recipe for Gourmet Stew.
perk_description.great_monarchs_guard: Spawn with Monarch's Guard (1 durability); Blocks any attacks while used.
perk_description.hapless_captain: Upon death, create a water source block where you died and a random fishy friend. You have +66%% water movment efficiency.
perk_description.harrowing: You always have oozing, weaving, and wind charged.
perk_description.heros_will: While your health is 5-, gain speed 2, resistance 2, and haste 4 for 10 seconds.
perk_description.imagination_engine: Press jump mid-air to dash, can't dash again until landing.
perk_description.leaf_on_the_wind: Your damage linearly increases the longer you avoid taking damage. Caps out at +50%% damage after 60s. You have -10%% scale.
perk_description.mana_perfection: Your mana is fixed at its maximum.
perk_description.martyrdom: When you die, create a lingering potion with a negative effect where you died after 3s.
perk_description.mold_pin: Spawn with a Mold Pin (7 durability, 0 damage, no knockback); On use take 1 damage and gain 1 mold stack. On hit inflicts victim with 1s of wither per mold stack you have, then removes all mold stacks. Has massively increased entity reach while you have 1+ mold stacks.
perk_description.moonjumper: You have 30%% gravity and 200%% safe fall distance.
perk_description.paradox_engine: When you start sprinting, leave a mark at your location. When you stop sprinting, the mark is removed and if you aren't holding sprint you teleport back to the mark. You have +8%% sprint speed.
perk_description.rapid_reinforcement: Spawn with speed 2 for 10s. Your respawn time is halved.
perk_description.soul_martyr: When you are eliminated (Once), all other allies gain 1 life shielding (They learn this) and if eliminated are revived. You cannot gain lives or life shielding.
perk_description.suppressing_fire: Your ranged weapon offsets its victim's rotation on hit.
perk_description.tacticians_eye: Spawn with Tactician's Eye (+64 block reach); Hitting a block creates a large marker that your team can see at that location. Hitting a block while holding sprint instead cycles through different messages that will be sent to your team when creating a marker.
perk_description.toymakers_gift: You have +1 perk cost limit but can only equip perks that cost 1-.
perk_description.unseen_whispers: Enemies that you bestow a life to get converted to your team (Unless they have this perk). Players you convert lose all lives and die when you are eliminated.
perk_description.urban_telepathy: You are immune to damage from your allies (Including yourself).
perk_description.void_avoidance: When you take damage from the void, summon and mount a fireworks rocket that lasts 3.5s, and gain slow falling for 5s. This perk can activate 2 times per life.
